metadata.author: PhysWorldLM Benchmark Suite
metadata.description: Flagship urban warfare benchmark for PhysWorldLM. A Blue SOF task force executes a hostage rescue and HVT capture inside a dense residential district. Exercises CQB, UAV ISR, electronic warfare, IED defeat, sniper overwatch, and civilian protection simultaneously. Tests all schema subsystems.

entities.name: Insurgent Safe House — Al-Rashid Apartments Building C

missions.name: Operation Iron Shield — Hostage Rescue and HVT Capture
missions.primary_objective: Rescue two hostages held in Al-Rashid Apartments Building C
secondary_objectives: Capture insurgent cell leader (KILO ACTUAL) alive
Disarm two IEDs on the approach route
Collect intelligence materials from second-floor room
Minimize structural damage to non-target buildings
missions.roe: ROE_HOSTILE_IDENTIFIED — positive ID required before engagement; protect civilians at all times

missions.name: Operation Iron Shield — Red Resistance
secondary_objectives: Delay Blue assault by minimum 15 minutes
missions.roe: UNRESTRICTED — engage all Blue personnel on sight

timeline.label: Safe House Positively Identified by UAV
EOD Robot TALON Deployed toward IED Alpha

events.notes: Operation Iron Shield commences. All elements in staging positions.
Raven-1 UAV launched for ISR orbit at 120m AGL over objective area.
IED Alpha rendered safe by TALON robot using manipulation arm.
Insurgent commercial drone launched from rooftop with improvised grenade payload.
Blue EW-1 drone jammer activates; insurgent drone loses control link and falls to ground.
